name: Sprint 11
context: Primary focus areas: Public Pages (8), Compliance (2), Communications (1).

notable_completed.title: Email Compose & History Page - Thread view compose attachments templates
notable_completed.description: Email Compose & History Page - Thread view compose attachments templates
notable_completed.summary: Email Compose & History Page (PG-141): 3-column email client with FolderSidebar (w-56), EmailList (w-80), and EmailThread/Compose (flex-1). 11 components created, 10 test files with 154 tests. Coverage:......
notable_completed.definitionOfDone: Response <500ms, Lighthouse >=90; EmailList, EmailThread, EmailCompose, AttachmentManager, TemplateSelector, RecipientPicker components; verified by: pnpm test
notable_completed.definitionOfDoneSnapshot: EmailList component renders email list with search and folder filtering; EmailThread component renders threaded view with expand/collapse; EmailCompose with To/CC/BCC, subject, rich body, send/save draft

notable_completed.title: Notification service MVP: unified delivery (in-app + email) with preference model (backend), templates, and audit logging
notable_completed.description: Notification service MVP: unified delivery (in-app + email) with preference model (backend), templates, and audit logging
notable_completed.summary: Notification domain model with lifecycle management; Unified delivery service (in-app + email); User notification preferences with defaults Notification domain + templates implemented; delivery adapters; preference defaults stored; audit entries; retries/DLQ;...
notable_completed.definitionOfDone: Notification domain + templates implemented; delivery adapters; preference defaults stored; audit entries; retries/DLQ; tests; targets: >=99%, >=100%; All four channels (email, SMS, webhook, push) must have real implementations, not placeholder returns

notable_completed.description: GDPR baseline controls: Supabase RLS policies, data minimisation, retention hooks
